RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.page_descri: Global switches for persona selection and token series availability.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.gameplay.de: These options default to off and apply globally across all profiles.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.other.title: Other
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.other.descr: Additional reserved toggles and experimental options.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_all_: Show every registered persona at run start instead of only a player-count-based subset.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_extr: If combat is not won by the end of the player-side turn 16, that combat immediately counts as a loss.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_dupl: Multiple players can choose the same starting persona without entering a conflict resolution fight.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_rand: Skip starting persona selection and give every player the same random persona. Changes apply to new runs only.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.banned_pers: Banned personas are removed from persona selection lists. Changes apply to new runs only.
Choose which personas are excluded from persona selection lists. Changes apply to new runs only.
Move personas between the available and banned lists.
{0}/{1} personas are currently banned. Changes apply to new runs only.
The banned persona list has been updated. New runs will use the updated filter.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.token_serie: Choose whether runs use two random expansions, all expansions, or no expansion series at all.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_pure: Reserved toggle. It currently has no gameplay effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_play: Reserved toggle. It currently has no gameplay effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_rout: Reserved toggle. It currently has no gameplay effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_toke: Reserved toggle. It currently has no gameplay effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_auto: Reserved toggle. It currently has no gameplay effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.telemetry.d: Manage anonymous balance telemetry at any time.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_tele: Allow anonymous usage statistics for personas, tokens, and skill cards.
Allow anonymized vanilla run history uploads for telemetry verification and diagnostics.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.notificatio: Control Astral notifications for different modules.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_sett: Show notifications when Astral settings change.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_tele: Show anonymous telemetry success, warning, and error notifications.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_mult: Show important multiplayer selection and synchronization problem notifications.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_TELEMETRY_POPUP.title: Anonymous Telemetry Notice
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_TELEMETRY_POPUP.body: This mod collects anonymous balance telemetry to analyze persona, token, and skill-card usage and win rates. It does not upload Steam IDs, player names, chat logs, or other direct identifiers. Choosing disable stops future uploads.
